tasks.title: ModelConfigResolver: pure module + settings schema extension
tasks.description: Create `src/services/modelConfigResolver.js` with two exports: `resolveStageModelConfig(agentId, agentSpec, settings, spaceModels, taskModels) → { provider, model, cliTool }` and `validateStageModelConfig(config) → { valid, errors }`. Add `pipeline.stageModels` (empty object default) to `DEFAULT_SETTINGS` in `src/handlers/settings.js`. Extend `deepMergeSettings` to merge three levels deep for the `pipeline.stageModels` path (currently two levels — a partial stageModels update overwrites the whole map). Add validation in `handlePutSettings` that calls `validateStageModelConfig` for each entry. VALID_PROVIDERS = ['claude','openai','ollama','custom']. VALID_CLI_TOOLS = ['claude','opencode','custom'].
acceptance_criteria: resolveStageModelConfig with no overrides returns { provider:'claude', model: agentSpec.model, cliTool:'claude' }
task override takes precedence over space override, which takes precedence over settings
deepMergeSettings with partial stageModels update merges into existing keys, not overwrites
PUT /api/v1/settings with invalid provider returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
100% unit test coverage on modelConfigResolver.js

tasks.title: CliAdapter: shell command abstraction + binary resolution
tasks.description: Create `src/services/cliAdapter.js`. Extract the Unix and Windows shell command builders from `pipelineManager.spawnStage()` into `buildUnixShellCommand(opts)` and `buildWindowsShellCommand(opts)` where `opts = { binary, finalArgs, promptPath, logPath, doneFile }`. Add `resolveCliBinary(cliTool, customBinary)` that resolves the binary path for 'claude' (reuse existing CLAUDE_BIN resolution logic, now as a function), 'opencode' (probe PATH + ~/.local/bin/opencode + /usr/local/bin/opencode), and 'custom' (use customBinary param or throw). Export these three functions. The consolidator and resolver-agent spawn paths (lines ~2757 and ~2893 in pipelineManager.js) must also be updated to use CliAdapter.
acceptance_criteria: buildUnixShellCommand output contains the EXIT trap, the done-sentinel write, and the log redirect
resolveCliBinary('claude') returns the same path as the current CLAUDE_BIN resolution
resolveCliBinary('custom', undefined) throws with a clear error message
All three CLAUDE_BIN usages in pipelineManager.js are replaced by CliAdapter calls
Unit tests for buildUnixShellCommand and buildWindowsShellCommand (mock filesystem)

tasks.title: SQLite migration: stage_models column on spaces and tasks
tasks.description: Add `stage_models TEXT` (nullable JSON) column to both the `spaces` and `tasks` tables in `src/services/store.js`. Follow the existing migration guard pattern (try ALTER TABLE + catch 'duplicate column' error or use a migration flag). Update `spaceFromRow()` to parse `fromJson(row.stage_models) ?? null` into `space.stageModels`. Update `taskFromRow()` similarly. Update `updateSpace()` and `updateTask()` to serialize `stageModels` when present. Add `getSpaceStageModels(spaceId)` and `getTaskStageModels(spaceId, taskId)` helper methods that return the parsed object or null.
acceptance_criteria: Server starts cleanly on an existing database (migration is backward-compatible)
PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId with stageModels persists and is returned in GET
Existing spaces with no stage_models column value return stageModels: null
Task stageModels round-trips through create → update → read without loss
Backend tests cover the new column read/write path

tasks.title: pipelineManager: resolve and apply model config at spawn time
tasks.description: In `spawnStage()`, after `resolveAgent()` returns `agentSpec`, add the model resolution block: (1) call `readSettings(dataDir)` to get `settings.pipeline.stageModels`; (2) call `store.getSpaceStageModels(spaceId)` and `store.getTaskStageModels(spaceId, taskId)`; (3) call `resolveStageModelConfig(agentId, agentSpec, settings, spaceModels, taskModels)`; (4) if the resolved model differs from `agentSpec.model`, inject `--model <model>` into `finalArgs`; (5) if `cliTool !== 'claude'`, call `resolveCliBinary(cliTool, settings.cli.customBinary)` to get the binary; (6) write `{ model, provider, cliTool, resolvedFrom }` into `run.stageStatuses[stageIndex]` before `writeRun()`; (7) update `stage-N.meta.json` to include `model`, `provider`, `cliTool`; (8) replace the three inline shell command constructions with `CliAdapter.buildUnixShellCommand()` / `buildWindowsShellCommand()`. Log `stage.model_resolved` event. Also update resolver-agent and consolidator spawn paths similarly (they get `folio-consolidator` / `resolver` config if declared in stageModels).
acceptance_criteria: A run with stageModels.developer-agent.model='claude-opus-4-5' spawns developer-agent with --model claude-opus-4-5 in the shell command
A run with no stageModels config produces identical behavior to pre-MODEL-1 (same shell command, same log)
stageStatuses[i].model and .provider are set in run.json at stage start time
stage-N.meta.json includes model and provider fields
stage.model_resolved log event is emitted with resolvedFrom field
Integration test: start run, check run.json after spawn, verify model field

tasks.title: Space and Task API: expose stageModels in REST + MCP
tasks.description: Ensure `PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId` accepts and validates a `stageModels` field (use `validateStageModelConfig` per entry). Ensure `GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId` and the spaces list response include `stageModels` (null when not set). Do the same for the task update path (`PUT /api/v1/tasks/:spaceId/:taskId` if it exists, or via the kanban task update handler in `src/handlers/tasks.js`). Add `stageModels` to the MCP `kanban_update_task` tool schema documentation (the tool already accepts free-form fields via the `description` and `assigned` update path; confirm `stageModels` passes through). Validation: each entry must pass validateStageModelConfig.
acceptance_criteria: PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId with invalid stageModels entry returns 400
GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId includes stageModels in response
PUT task update with stageModels persists correctly and appears in GET task response
MCP kanban_update_task with stageModels field passes through to SQLite

tasks.title: Frontend: ModelRoutingSettings component (global settings)
tasks.description: Create `frontend/src/components/config/ModelRoutingSettings.tsx`. The component renders a table of pipeline stages (from `settings.pipeline.stages`) with per-row selectors: Provider (radio or dropdown: claude / openai / ollama / custom), Model (text input or dropdown of presets per provider), CLI Tool (dropdown: claude / opencode / custom). Presets per provider: claude → ['claude-opus-4-5', 'claude-sonnet-4-5', 'claude-haiku-4-5']; openai → ['gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o-mini']; ollama → ['qwen2.5-coder:32b', 'llama3.3:70b', 'mistral-nemo'] (user can type any value). A 'Clear override' button per row resets to frontmatter default. Reads from `useAppStore.settings.pipeline.stageModels`. Writes via `PUT /api/v1/settings` with partial `{ pipeline: { stageModels: {...} } }`. Wire it into `ConfigFileSidebar` as a new 'Model Routing' item. Use existing design system: `bg-surface-elevated`, `text-text-primary`, shared `Button` component.
acceptance_criteria: ModelRoutingSettings renders a row per stage in settings.pipeline.stages
Selecting a model preset updates the store and issues PUT /api/v1/settings
Custom model text input is accepted (not constrained to presets)
Clear override removes the agentId key from stageModels and saves
Component is accessible: all inputs have labels, keyboard navigation works
Vitest snapshot test covers the rendered table structure

tasks.title: Frontend: per-space stageModels override UI
tasks.description: Add a 'Model Overrides' collapsible section to the existing Space settings / edit modal (wherever space details are currently editable). The section is identical in structure to ModelRoutingSettings but scoped to the space's pipeline stages (use space.pipeline if set, else settings.pipeline.stages). Reads/writes via PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId with `{ stageModels: {...} }`. Shows inherited value (from global settings) as placeholder when no override is set. Use `text-text-secondary` italic label 'Inherited from global settings' to communicate the fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Space edit modal shows Model Overrides section
Setting a model override for a space persists to SQLite via PUT /api/v1/spaces/:id
When no override: inherited value is shown as placeholder with italic label
Clearing the override removes the entry from space.stageModels

tasks.title: Frontend: per-task stageModels override + run.json model display
tasks.description: Two sub-tasks in one: (1) Add a 'Model Overrides' collapsible section to the task detail drawer/modal (wherever task fields are edited). Same selector as space override, writes via PUT task update with `{ stageModels: {...} }`. (2) In the RunPanel / stage status display (wherever stageStatuses are shown), add a small model badge per stage: e.g. 'claude-opus-4-5' chip next to the stage name, sourced from `stageStatuses[i].model`. Show nothing if `model` field is absent (backward compat with old runs). Use Badge or a small `text-xs text-text-secondary` chip.
acceptance_criteria: Task detail shows Model Overrides section with per-stage selectors
Task stageModels override persists and is reflected in next run (stageStatuses.model)
RunPanel shows model badge per stage for completed and running runs
Old runs without model field show no badge (no crash, no empty chip)

tasks.title: Backend tests: ModelConfigResolver, CliAdapter, settings validation, pipelineManager integration
tasks.description: Add test files: `tests/modelConfigResolver.test.js` (unit: all inheritance combinations, edge cases — null overrides, unknown agentId, partial configs), `tests/cliAdapter.test.js` (unit: shell command output format, binary resolution for each cliTool type), extend `tests/settings.test.js` with stageModels validation cases. Add one integration test in `tests/pipeline.test.js`: create a run with a stageModels override in the body, set PIPELINE_NO_SPAWN=1, check that run.json stageStatuses[0] has the expected model/provider/cliTool fields. All tests must pass with `npm run test:report`.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test:report exits OK with no new failures
ModelConfigResolver: 100% branch coverage (task overrides space, space overrides settings, fallback to frontmatter)
CliAdapter: Unix and Windows command builders tested with mock paths
Settings handler: invalid stageModels provider rejects with 400
Pipeline integration: run.json stageStatuses[0].model = override value after spawn
